# Contributing to Live Translator

Thank you for contributing.

## Development Process

1. Read all project documentation.
2. Follow the Software Requirements Specification.
3. Follow the Architecture document.
4. Follow the Coding Standards.
5. Follow the Testing Standards.
6. Keep commits focused on a single milestone.
7. Update the changelog.
8. Update the project state.
9. Ensure all tests pass before submitting.

## Coding Rules

- No placeholder code.
- No TODO comments.
- No dead code.
- No duplicated logic.
- Production-quality implementations only.

## Testing

Every contribution must pass:

- Static analysis
- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- Virtual Enigma2 validation

## Documentation

Documentation must remain synchronized with implementation.

Documentation is considered part of the codebase.
